creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Fix: gtar -- GNU TAR and CPIO safer_name_suffix Remote Denial of Service Vulnerability gtar 1.16

SecurityFocus reports:

GNUs tar and cpio utilities are prone to a denial-of-service vulnerability because of insecure use of the alloca function. Successfully exploiting this issue allows attackers to crash the affected utilities and possibly to execute code but this has not been confirmed. GNU tar and cpio utilities share the same vulnerable code and are both affected. Other utilities sharing this code may also be affected.

http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/26445/ CVE-2007-4476 26445 2007-11-14 2009-01-15
